# PHIL.023 ? Confucianism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** confucianism
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Ritual propriety (li); filial piety; social harmony; virtue cultivation; education and self-improvement; reciprocity

## Application
Maintain proper relationships; cultivate virtue through practice; value education and tradition; seek social harmony; reciprocal treatment

## Key Values
- Propriety
- Filial piety
- Social harmony
- Self-cultivation

philosophy, eastern-philosophy, confucianism
